name: Southeast Asia (Rewards & Community)
culture_notes: The 'Gift Code' Hook: Floating gift codes (e.g., GIFT777) are mandatory to break CTR defenses.
KOL/UGC Dominance: Local influencers reacting loudly and emotionally to Gacha pulls.
Weird/Funny Humor: Especially in Thailand, self-deprecating or slapstick humor performs exceptionally well.
Low-spec Optimization: Ads should look smooth to imply the game runs well on mid-range devices.

visual_specs.typography: Bright, colorful, often with thick outlines. Multi-language support (TH/VN/ID) is critical.
visual_specs.ui_style: Cluttered but vibrant. Show 'Red Packets' or 'Lucky Spin' wheels prominently.
visual_specs.pacing: Chaotic and energetic. Constant sound effects and visual 'surprises'.

preferred_bgm: Trending local TikTok remixes or high-pitched, energetic dance music.
focus: Free Rewards (Gifts) > Social Interaction > Slapstick Fun
taboo: General extreme violence or severe local offenses
